config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 10/05/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsImageMasterConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.print("New Session")
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'                     
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			
#		queryPath="Project_VECV/Master/ImageMasterConfiguration/getTableView"
#		data=system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath)
#		self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblImage").props.data=data	
		
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='User Managment'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ImageConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> ImageConfiguration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Amit Ravat
		Written Date: 10/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
		#To open and close rightviews on table click
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		
		#imageTable data retrieving
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
		messageType = 'ImageConfigurationPanel'  
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		Action = "Update"
		system
		for data in	selectedRow:
			Id = data['Id']
			isActive = data["Is Active"]
			if isActive:
				isActive = 1
			else:
				isActive = 0
			name = data["View"]
			payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
			'modelId':data["ModelId"],
			'areaId':data["AreaId"],
			'lineId':data["LineId"],
			'workStationId':data["WorkStationId"],
			'imageName':data["Image Name"],
			'imageDescription':data["Description"],
			'imageTypeId':data["ImageTypeId"],
			'isActive':isActive,
			'url':name,
			'Id':Id
			}

		folderName = 'Project_VECV/Image'
		colName = 'Id'
		self.session.custom.selectedImageId = Id
		self.session.custom.SelectedImageURL = name
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
	except:
		screenName ='Image Master Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ImageConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->ImageMasterConfiguration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar ravat
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'ImageConfigurationPanel'  
		Action = "Save" 				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'modelId':'','areaId':'','lineId':'','workStationId':'','imageName':'','imageDescription':'','imageTypeId':'','isActive':1,'Id':'',"Action":Action}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Image Master Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ImageConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/tblImage')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 10/05/2024
		Purpose: remove selection on double click and make reset in panel. 
	"""
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblImage").props.selection.selectedRow = -1
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblImage").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
